pro.name: Pro Monthly
features: All prank modes + new ones first

legal.a: Yes — for personal, non-defamatory pranks between consenting friends. Don't use it for fraud, harassment, or to deceive someone for money. Be kind. Don't be a jerk.

stored.a: Nope. Your photo is processed in memory, then deleted within 1 hour. The prank photo you generate stays in your account so you can re-download it, but you can delete it any time.

real.a: Suspiciously real. Our AI uses face-preservation tech trained on your selfie. Most people cannot tell the difference. That's the point. Don't abuse this power.

cancel.a: Yes — one click in your account. No questions, no guilt trip. We'll miss you, but we get it.

refund.a: If your prank didn't cook right (blurry face, weird artifacts), email us within 7 days and we'll refund you. No questions.

languages.a: English, French, and Spanish. Our goblin speaks all three.

merge.a: Merge Mode lets you upload TWO photos — a subject (the person or object) and a scene (the background). Our AI merges them so the subject appears naturally placed in the scene. Example: a homeless man in a mansion, or your pet in a sports car.
